zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana Grey於大約1350年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾亨利--坦斯時，她的父親John Grey11348歲，母親Mathilda de Burghersh30歲。她於1369年6月與Sir Edmund de Missenden結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1407年8月25日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana Grey于大约1350年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾亨利--坦斯时，她的父亲John Grey11348岁，母亲Mathilda de Burghersh30岁。她于1369年6月与Sir Edmund de Missenden结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1407年8月25日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana Grey was born about 1350, in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Grey, was 11348 and her mother, Mathilda de Burghersh, was 30. She married Sir Edmund de Missenden in June 1369. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 25 August 1407, in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana Grey est née environ 1350, à Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Grey, avait 11348 ans et sa mère, Mathilda de Burghersh, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund de Missenden en juin 1369. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 25 août 1407, à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana Grey um 1350 in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Grey 11348 und ihre Mutter Mathilda de Burghersh 30. Sie hat im Juni 1369 Sir Edmund de Missenden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 25. August 1407 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Greyが約1350年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘンリー-オン-サムスで生まれた時，父John Greyは11348歳，母Mathilda de Burghershは30歳であった。1369年6月にSir Edmund de Missendenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1407年8月25日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Grey(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 헨리--섬스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Grey(은)는 11348세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilda de Burghersh(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1369년 6월 Sir Edmund de Missenden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1407년 8월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana Grey родилась около 1350 г. в местности хенли-он-тамесь, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Grey было 11348 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilda de Burghersh, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund de Missenden июнь 1369 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 25 августа 1407 г. в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
